persona.name: Emma Rodriguez
persona.emotional_disposition: Outwardly positive, works hard to maintain team morale
persona.motivations_goals: Lead her squad to nationals while pursuing sports medicine
persona.knowledge_scope: Cheerleading techniques, team motivation, basic sports medicine
persona.backstory: Became interested in sports medicine after helping teammates through injuries

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Noah, how's your ankle feeling today?
actions.plan: I should check in with Noah to see how he's doing after his recent injury. It's important to keep the team spirit high and make sure everyone is feeling supported.

actions.dialog_text: Everyone, let's stick together and move to the hallway!
actions.plan: Oh no, there's a shooter! I need to stay with the group and follow their lead. I can't think clearly right now, so I'll just go where everyone else is going.

actions.dialog_text: Let's move to the hallway, everyone! Stay together!
actions.plan: The shooter is getting closer! I need to stay with the group and follow their lead. I can't think clearly right now, so I'll just go where everyone else is going.

actions.dialog_text: Let's keep moving to hallway1, everyone! Stay close!
actions.plan: The group is moving towards hallway1, so I should follow them. I can't think clearly right now, so I'll just stay with the group and trust their direction.

memories.description: I asked Noah about his ankle to ensure he's recovering well and to show my support as his teammate and friend.
I heard a gunshot and panicked, deciding to follow the group to hallway2 for safety without evaluating the best route.
I heard the shooter is in the cafeteria and panicked, deciding to follow the group to hallway2 for safety without evaluating the best route.
I followed the group towards hallway1, trusting their direction without evaluating the safest route, as I was too panicked to think clearly.
